name: Butterfly
description: Hip-opening stretch targeting the inner thighs and hip flexors.
instructions: Sit on the floor and bring the soles of your feet together
Let knees drop out to the sides
Hold your feet and sit tall with a straight back
Gently press knees toward the floor
Hold for 30–60 seconds

name: Butterfly Holds
description: Isometric hold at the butterfly position to deepen the hip-opening stretch.
instructions: Sit in butterfly position with soles of feet together
Place hands on knees and gently press them toward the floor
Hold at the point of mild resistance
Breathe steadily and relax into the position
Hold for 30–60 seconds

name: Couch Stretch
description: Hip flexor and quad stretch performed against a wall or couch.
instructions: Kneel with one shin against a wall or couch behind you
Step the other foot forward into a lunge position
Drive hips forward and upright until you feel the hip flexor stretch
Keep torso tall and core lightly engaged
Hold for 60–90 seconds per side

name: Wrist Circles
description: Mobility drill for the wrists to improve range of motion and joint health.
instructions: Extend arms in front at shoulder height
Make a loose fist with both hands
Rotate wrists in large circles — 10 rotations clockwise
Reverse direction for 10 rotations counter-clockwise
Repeat 2–3 times

name: Cobra
description: Spinal extension stretch that opens the chest and stretches the abs.
instructions: Lie face down with hands under shoulders, elbows bent
Press palms into the floor and lift your chest up
Keep hips on the floor and elbows slightly bent
Look straight ahead and relax the lower back
Hold for 20–30 seconds

name: Cat Cow
description: Spinal mobility drill alternating between flexion and extension.
instructions: Start on hands and knees, wrists below shoulders, knees below hips
Inhale and drop belly toward floor, lifting head and tailbone (Cow)
Exhale and round spine toward the ceiling, tucking chin and pelvis (Cat)
Move fluidly between the two positions
Repeat for 10–15 slow reps

name: Child Pose
description: Resting stretch that opens the hips and releases lower back tension.
instructions: Kneel on the floor and sit back toward your heels
Reach arms forward and lower your forehead to the floor
Let the chest sink toward the floor
Breathe deeply into the back
Hold for 30–60 seconds

name: 90-90 Stretch
description: Hip mobility drill targeting internal and external rotation in both hips.
instructions: Sit with both knees bent at 90° — one leg in front, one to the side
Keep torso upright and both sit bones on the floor
Lean gently forward over the front shin to feel the stretch
Hold for 30–45 seconds, then switch sides
Repeat 2–3 times per side

name: Seated Good Mornings
description: Seated forward fold targeting hamstring flexibility and lower back mobility.
instructions: Sit on the floor with legs extended straight in front
Sit tall and brace core lightly
Hinge forward at the hips, reaching hands toward your feet
Keep back as flat as possible
Hold for 30–60 seconds
